## Principles checklist

- [ ] KISS — no unnecessary complexity introduced
- [ ] YAGNI — only what's needed now; no speculative code
- [ ] SOLID — single responsibility, sound abstractions, focused interfaces
- [ ] Edits follow `.claude/rules/code-edits.md` (no placeholder/unchanged stubs)

## Validation

- [ ] Knowledge graph regenerated if structure changed
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Morpheus / code-quality loop run for significant code changes
